steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that the discrepancy is “explicable in terms of OFT.” This asserts that OFT's explanatory reach includes the observational pattern being discussed.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
That pattern is opposite responses by different species to the same circumstance.

The correct answer directly captures this: OFT can account for different species responding differently to similar ecological circumstances.

The passage demonstrates this—different visual reliance means different cost-benefit calculations for each species.

The other choices misread either the significance of the discrepancy or the scope of OFT's explanatory power.

That is the correct answer.
